title: WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF WIC is a public health program designed to improve health outcomes and influence lifetime nutrition and health behaviors for women, infants, and children. Nutrition education classes are provided as part of the program; other services include breastfeeding support, monthly benefits for supplemental nutritious foods, and referrals to community resources. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Applicants must meet four criteria to be eligible for WIC: -Live in Oregon (US citizenship is NOT required to participate in WIC) -Be pregnant, postpartum, or breastfeeding, or have an infant or child under age 5. Fathers, foster parents, and other guardians can also apply on behalf of a qualifying child. Meet income requirements Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 322-7435 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 322-7435 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment or visit the website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of ID for parent/guardian and child, proof of address, and proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: WIC Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
